title: angelphytum tenuifolium
intro: Angelphytum tenuifolium, also known as Angelica tenuifolia, is a perennial plant that belongs to the carrot family and is native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Angelphytum tenuifolium include relieving stress, improving sleep quality, and reducing symptoms of anxiety and depression, as well as alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Angelphytum tenuifolium include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
